home.heroTitle: Windows handmade in a Batumi workshop.
home.heroSub: Aluminium and PVC. Roman Sharashidze's workshop in Salibauri — since 1998.

configurator.metaDescription: Configure your window — product, material, price in one minute, no operator needed.

type.title: Product
type.heading: What are we building?
type.intro: Pick a product — window, door or more. Material comes next.

material.title: Material
material.heading: Which material?
material.intro: Per m² starting price under each option. Step 3 computes the final price from your real dimensions.
material.errorBody: Network or server didn't reply. We'll try again.

price.footnote: Step 3 computes the exact price from your real dimensions.
price.needSelections: Pick a product and material — the price will show immediately.

stub.title: Dimensions step is coming
stub.body: Step 3 — width and height, then Step 4-9: layout, glass, colour, accessories, order. Part of Phase 1 MVP.

catalog.metaDescription: Windows and doors handmade in a Batumi workshop — aluminium, PVC, sliding, panoramic, balcony glazing.
catalog.heading: Windows and doors handmade in a Batumi workshop.
catalog.intro: Five product families. Material, install, starting price visible per card. Pick one and the configurator takes over.
catalog.errorBody: Network or server didn't reply. We'll try again — if the problem persists, get in touch.
